name: Glider Sim Lite - Soaring / Flight Sim

reviews.review_title: One of my favorites now has a free demo!
reviews.review_description: This game was a game changer for me!!! Got me hooked! Now I have all my gear, went to traing, and am officially a paramotor pilot in real life! If you want to experience paramotor/ paraglider/ hang gliding or my favorites the speed wing!!! Then this is the game for you!  My instructor was quite pleased with my understanding and ability while doing my actual training and I 100% accredit this game! Thanks Joey!

Update march 5th  2026 so the dev Joey responded back and yes I have plenty of room 512 gb version and when I reinstalled the game and increased the online Google graphics and long as the scenery wasn't covered with buildings it looked decent 600 feet high so that helped thx joey... but I ended up since I have a pc I grabbed the steam version and bought it and yes looks really good up in air and even down to 180 ft the buildings still looked decent I was on for 4 hrs straight... definitely didn't disappoint....hopefully Joey can tweak it a bit more on online scenery for the stand alone version I have faith in this guy so changing my score.... 





So im trying this demo and yes its relaxing and I see Google earth online has no subscription anymore so that's a big plus for people and the controls on some of the gliders work decent but few others are hard to maneuver....my main gripe is the graphics are horrible pixelated the ground is and when u do Google earth online on the free trial 3 day it looked bad everything looked like clay even up in air kinda high and that broke my immersion... I even changed graphics and lowered and highered and still looked bad on land even tried with quest game optimizer app and still did nothing so im skeptical since I own a 4070gpu card I wonder if the graphics will look more like Google earth like its supposed to but no demo on there on steam.... definitely need bit more content maybe add wingsuit option as well and better cloud features ....overall its a relaxing game but not being able to see what ur looking at above to the ground like clay is a big let down so definitely no go on stand alone for 30$.... ima try steam version and hoping for best if its way better on graphics then ill keep pc version if not refund it will be.... ill change my star rating if I find a fix on ur stand alone demo but I dont think I will

developer_response.body:
Hi sh0ch3r34, thanks for the feedback. If you could send me an email at joeysipos@5Drealities.com with a screenshot of what you're seeing, that would help me determine whether everything is working as intended.

In the meantime, you could try clearing the app data or reinstalling the game. Also make sure you have enough free space on your Quest for Earth Online to download scenery. You might also try increasing the Earth Online Detail slider in the graphics settings.

The Steam version of Glider Sim Lite is also planned to release later this March.

reviews.review_description: Glider Sim Deluxe is the best flying game on Quest, and this “Free Sample” preview version is a great way to try it out at zero cost
Game plays good Little bit hard to get used to
İT SAYS 😀its free enyoj it😀 an then wants 30 dolars what a scam

developer_response.body: Hi BubblyMeerkat. I want to inform you that a big update just went live. Starting now, no credit card is required for the Earth Online trial. On top of that, we've added a free custom map - Sun Valley, Idaho, USA - with full access to ALL aircraft, lessons, unlimited play, and no time restrictions!
